examples: The loggers, who belong to a rural co-operative (or ejido) that owns 680 hectares of the nearby Ocampo forest, will use the rest to make simple furniture.
Other issues the Ejido have focus on environmental damage, trucking concessions and the workers cafeteria.
It's far from clear who in El Ejido is responsible for whipping up an atmosphere of racial tension.
What followed was a near two-month blockade of La Platosa by the Ejido union, beginning July 8 and ending Sept. 10.
